creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried to build this, but got:

** Missing /usr/ports/security/ossec-hids-server/files/template-pushed-sample.xml.in for ossec-hids-server-2.9.4.

which I think may be because I deleted empty files from the port dir, since it's usually a mistake to commit empty files. I went back and looked at the file in the tarball and it is empty there as well. Should it be empty?
